stage: S4 (2016+ A0/A1/A2 Expansion) / P04 A2 重要区与功能区 cohort

value.user_value: An A2 production gate that promotes a zone to continuous production ONLY on real 30-day health evidence, and keeps the rest disabled/low-frequency. Over the 18 A2 zones (T053+T054): 0 promoted (none has 30-day health yet), 3 held low-frequency (1-day recon), 15 disabled -- 0 promoted for a count target. A control proves the gate would promote a 30-day-health source and would not promote a high-value source lacking it.
value.why_it_matters: Production promotion must be earned by demonstrated stability, not coverage optics. A gate that refuses to promote without 30-day health is exactly what keeps the system authoritative and stable rather than padded.

cost.note: unknown != 0; a gate/decision task over the T053/T054 cohorts -> 0 cloud cost.

deployment: NOT_DEPLOYED (promotion ledger + cost/quality evidence + rollback; production worker/cron/data untouched, live build unchanged b189d3cc0703 == T040)
